creator: r.quakkelaar@quaras.nl
text:
Forgot to mention all my basic switches used:

CFLAGS+=-fms-extensions -fcond-mismatch -flax-vector-conversions -Wall -Wextra -Wno-deprecated -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-format -w

CXXFLAGS+=-fvisibility-ms-compat -fpermissive

also with and without the mentioned -fabi-* and also -fno-default-inline

Note: I thougt that when I changed sentence "Short live helas" to
"Short lived helas" and submitted it would change comment 18,
not create a new comment 19 and I cannot find a delete button...
